summary: Verified integer points formatting refactor. Backend APIs return int types (not floats). Found and fixed frontend issue where React Native Web was rendering numbers as '0.0' instead of '0' when using Math.round() without .toString().

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: Points displaying as '0.0' instead of '0' due to missing .toString() on Math.round()
FIXED: Same .toString() issue on 4 Math.round() calls

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Backend uses int() wrapping on all point outputs in standings.py, user.py, predictions.py, live.py
VERIFIED: GET /api/standings/total returns total_points and current_week_points as int type (41, 39, 18 - not 41.0)
VERIFIED: GET /api/home returns user_summary.total_points, last_5_performance[].points as int type
VERIFIED: GET /api/standings/weekly returns matchday_points, base_points, joker_bonus as int type
VERIFIED: GET /api/standings/user returns total_points, total_base_points, total_joker_bonus as int type
FIXED: Frontend LastFiveIndicator.tsx - added .toString() to Math.round(item.points) to prevent '0.0' display
FIXED: Frontend TournamentView.tsx - added .toString() to 4 Math.round() calls for scores and points
VERIFIED: Home screen PERFORMANCE section shows '0', '39' etc (no .0 decimals)
VERIFIED: Rankings screen shows '41', '39', '18', '0' etc (no .0 decimals)
VERIFIED: TREND bars show integer points without decimals

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All point displays verified as integers

context_for_next_testing_agent: Integer points formatting verified working. Backend uses int() on all point outputs. Frontend fixed to use .toString() after Math.round() to prevent React Native Web from displaying '0.0'. All APIs and UI screens verified: /api/standings/total, /api/home, /api/standings/weekly, /api/standings/user, /api/live, /api/predictions. Home PERFORMANCE section, TREND bars, and Rankings all show integers. The only toFixed remaining is for EUR currency in tournament entry fee (intentional).

verified_features.backend_standings_total_int: PASS - total_points, current_week_points are int type
verified_features.backend_home_int: PASS - user_summary.total_points, last_5_performance[].points are int type
verified_features.backend_weekly_standings_int: PASS - matchday_points, base_points, joker_bonus are int type
verified_features.backend_user_profile_int: PASS - total_points, total_base_points, total_joker_bonus are int type

rca_of_issue.original_bug: Frontend displaying points as '0.0' instead of '0' in PERFORMANCE section and TREND bars
rca_of_issue.root_cause: React Native Web renders numbers differently than expected. When using Math.round() without .toString(), the value 0 was being displayed as '0.0' in some cases
rca_of_issue.fix_implemented: Added .toString() after all Math.round() calls in LastFiveIndicator.tsx and TournamentView.tsx to ensure string conversion
rca_of_issue.verification: Confirmed frontend now shows '0', '39', '8' etc - all integers without decimal points
